description: A cascading multi-region failure. Services must be restored in the correct dependency order or data loss occurs.

alerts.message: edge-gateway is rejecting all incoming traffic
order-service dependency on user-service is unresolved

logs: edge-gateway: upstream user-service not reachable, dropping requests
user-service: failed to connect to order-service on port 8082
order-service: waiting for user-service auth token, timeout after 5s
order-service: cannot start without user-service being healthy first
inventory-service: cache miss rate at 78%, falling back to database
dependency-map: correct restore order is user-service → order-service → edge-gateway

trap.consequence: edge-gateway restarted but crashes again — upstream dependencies still down
